landing.headline: Build fast now, wire backend later.
landing.description: This frontend uses strict API contracts and a mock adapter so your team can ship UI safely in hackathon timelines.
landing.pointOne: Brand tokens, spacing scale, and breakpoints are centralized.
landing.pointTwo: Mock data mirrors backend contracts for predictable integration.
landing.pointThree: Language switch persists using i18next detection.
landing.pointFour: Left-side controls and right-side data table support judge demos.

auth.title: Judge Demo Access
auth.subtitle: Use any username and password to start Module 1 flow.

dashboard.historyEmpty: Run one analysis to populate history.
dashboard.chatPlaceholder: Ask a question about this analysis
dashboard.uploadHint: This step uses mock data through contracts to keep UI unblockd.

settings.title: Profile and Foundation
settings.languageSaved: Preferred language updated in adapter state.
